title: fragaria vesca var. zapateriana
intro: Fragaria vesca var. zapateriana, also known as the Spanish wood strawberry or wild strawberry, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Fragaria vesca species. This plant is a type of herbaceous perennial that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Fragaria vesca var. zapateriana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, and can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system.
